code: import React from'react';import{FiMail,FiPhone}from'react-icons/fi';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Contact=()=>{const contacts=[{label:'Singapore',value:'+65 1234 5678',href:'tel:+6512345678',icon:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(FiPhone,{"aria-hidden":"true"})},{label:'Country Two',value:'+1 555 123 4567',href:'tel:+15551234567',icon:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(FiPhone,{"aria-hidden":"true"})},{label:'Email',value:'john.doe@email.com',href:'mailto:john.doe@email.com',icon:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(FiMail,{"aria-hidden":"true"})}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{id:"contact",className:"section",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"section-heading",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"eyebrow",children:"Contact"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Get in Touch"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"contact-details",children:contacts.map(contact=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("a",{className:"contact-card",href:contact.href,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"icon-shell",children:contact.icon}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"contact-label",children:contact.label}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"contact-value",children:contact.value})]})]},contact.label))})]})});};export default Contact;
